title: AuditAnchorRecord
description: An append-only audit anchoring record that binds an entry digest into a rolling root together with witness and media references.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

targetId.description: URN or stable identifier of the object being anchored.

entryHash.description: sha256: prefixed digest of the exact anchored entry payload.

previousRoot.description: Optional sha256: prefixed digest of the previous rolling root.

root.description: sha256: prefixed digest of the current rolling root after inclusion of this record.

witnessSet.description: Optional set of witness identities that observed or countersigned the anchored state.

signerSet.description: Optional set of signers whose signatures attest to this anchored record.

mediaRefs.description: Optional references to the storage locations that carry this record or its enclosing log segment.

anchoredAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the entry was committed into the rolling root.
